name: Luau Pork Teriyaki
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut pork into slices about 1/4 inch thick.
2. Drain pineapple and reserve all syrup.
3. In a bowl, blend the reserved syrup, teriyaki sauce, green onions, ginger, and garlic powder until smooth.
4. Pour the blended mixture over the pork and pineapple pieces, ensuring they are well coated. Cover and refrigerate for at least 1 hour.
5. Meanwhile, cook rice according to package directions and prepare grill.
6. Remove pork from the marinade and grill about 5 inches from hot coals for about 5 minutes on each side or until thoroughly cooked.
7. Pour the remaining marinade into a large skillet and bring to a boil over medium-high heat.
8. Once boiling, remove from heat and serve pork with sauce and pineapple slices over rice.
